title: A Strange New Crewmate
description: On pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part focuses on robin boards the merry. Nico Robin appears aboard the Going Merry and forces the crew to confront the fact that a former enemy now wants to travel with them.
scene: This scene belongs to the Robin Boards the Merry sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Nico Robin, Luffy, Nami, Narrator, Usopp.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: ...But what do you want to do?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I've been Waaaail- Tiling for youuuuuu all!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Nice to see you all again!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's meet again some day for sure!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sigh... Oh, you silly little goose.

summary: Nico Robin appears aboard the Going Merry and forces the crew to confront the fact that a former enemy now wants to travel with them.
